name: Orlando International Airport
description: Central Florida's primary airport serving over 50 million passengers annually. Located 60 miles west of Port Canaveral and minutes from Orlando's theme parks.

name: Orlando Sanford International Airport
description: Handles many international charter flights and low-cost carriers. Located 70 miles from Port Canaveral in Seminole County.

name: Tampa International Airport
description: Tampa Bay area's main airport serving the Gulf Coast. Award-winning facility located minutes from downtown Tampa and Ybor City.

name: Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport
description: Major airport in South Florida serving Broward County and the greater Fort Lauderdale area. Close to Port Everglades cruise terminal.

name: Palm Beach International Airport
description: Serves the Palm Beach County area including West Palm Beach, Boca Raton, and Jupiter. Popular for corporate and private travel.

name: Daytona Beach International Airport
description: Serves the Volusia County area. Located near Daytona International Speedway and the Daytona Beach boardwalk.
